title: Network Service Header (NSH) Encapsulation for In Situ OAM (IOAM) Data
abstract: In situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (IOAM) is used for recording and collecting operational and telemetry information while the packet traverses a path between two points in the network.  This document outlines how IOAM-Data-Fields are encapsulated with the Network Service Header (NSH).
